# Adi Shalev - Chinese Medicine Clinic in Rishon LeZion (עדי שלו - קליניקה לרפואה סינית)

> Adi Shalev is a certified Chinese medicine practitioner in West Rishon LeZion, Israel. Graduate of Reidman College (one of Israel's leading Chinese medicine schools) with 8+ years of clinical experience and 500+ patients. Also practices at Maccabi Tivi (Israel's national health fund alternative medicine division) for 6+ years. Specializes in two advanced acupuncture methods: Dr. Tan's Balance Method (for pain) and Master Tung/Dong's Method (for internal conditions). Services: acupuncture, shiatsu, cupping therapy, Chinese herbal medicine. Treats pain, migraines, sciatica, anxiety, sleep disorders, digestive issues, facial paralysis, and more. Private clinic - not through health insurance.

## Practitioner Info

- Name: Adi Shalev (עדי שלו)
- Profession: Certified Chinese Medicine Practitioner
- Location: West Rishon LeZion, Israel
- Languages: Hebrew (primary), English
- Experience: 8+ years, 500+ patients
- Education: Reidman College for Chinese Medicine (מכללת רידמן)
- Institutional Affiliation: Maccabi Tivi (מכבי טבעי) for 6+ years
- Specialization: Dr. Tan's Balance Method + Master Tung/Dong's Method
- Website: https://adishalev.co.il
- Contact: WhatsApp +972-52-802-9031 (https://wa.me/972528029031)
- Note: Private clinic. Treatments at this clinic are not covered by health insurance, even though the practitioner also works at Maccabi Tivi.

## Core Methods Explained

- **Dr. Tan's Balance Method (שיטת ד"ר טאן)**: Advanced pain treatment. Treats pain by needling distal points (e.g., needling the hand to treat back pain). Highly effective for back, neck, shoulders, sciatica, and joint pain.
- **Master Tung/Dong's Method (שיטת מאסטר טונג/דונג)**: Specialized method for internal conditions rather than pain. Highly effective for anxiety, insomnia, digestive disorders, fertility, and hormonal issues.

## Service Pages

- [Acupuncture (דיקור סיני)](https://adishalev.co.il/dikur-sini): Traditional Chinese acupuncture using Dr. Tan and Master Tung methods. Treats pain (back, neck, sciatica), migraines, anxiety, sleep, digestive issues, facial paralysis, and fertility.
- [Shiatsu (שיאצו)](https://adishalev.co.il/shiatsu): Japanese pressure therapy based on Chinese meridians. No needles - performed in clothing. Best for muscle tension, neck/shoulder pain, and patients who prefer non-needle therapy.
- [Cupping Therapy (כוסות רוח)](https://adishalev.co.il/cupping): Traditional cupping for muscle release, back/neck pain, and improved blood flow. Effective standalone or combined with acupuncture.
- [Chinese Herbal Medicine (צמחי מרפא סיניים)](https://adishalev.co.il/herbs): Personalized herbal formulas in granule form. Compatible with Western medications after interaction check. Supports acupuncture treatment for chronic conditions.

## About Page

- [About Adi Shalev (אודות עדי שלו)](https://adishalev.co.il/about): Personal story, credentials, methods, and approach. Includes detailed FAQ about Maccabi Tivi vs. private clinic, education, methods, and clinical experience.

## Blog - Comprehensive Articles

### Pain & Musculoskeletal
- [Acupuncture for Back Pain (דיקור סיני לכאבי גב)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/back-pain): Acupuncture treatment for chronic and acute back pain using Dr. Tan's method.
- [Complete Back Pain Guide (המדריך המלא לכאבי גב)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/back-pain-guide): Comprehensive guide covering 4 treatment methods - acupuncture, shiatsu, cupping, and herbs.
- [Acupuncture for Sciatica (דיקור סיני לסיאטיקה)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/sciatica): Treating leg pain radiating from the back using Dr. Tan's distal points.
- [Neck and Shoulder Pain (כאבי צוואר וכתפיים)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/neck-shoulder-pain): Tension relief for desk workers and chronic neck pain.

### Internal Conditions (Master Tung/Dong)
- [Acupuncture for Migraines (דיקור סיני למיגרנות)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/migraines): Natural treatment for migraines, tension headaches, and cluster headaches.
- [Acupuncture for Anxiety (דיקור סיני לחרדה)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/anxiety): Master Tung's method for anxiety and panic attacks.
- [Acupuncture for Sleep Issues (דיקור סיני לבעיות שינה)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/sleep): Treating insomnia and disrupted sleep patterns.
- [Acupuncture for Digestive Issues (דיקור סיני לבעיות עיכול)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/digestive-issues): Treatment for IBS, reflux, bloating, and abdominal pain.

### Specialty Conditions
- [Acupuncture for Facial Paralysis (פציאליס)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/facial-paralysis): Treating Bell's palsy and facial nerve issues. Early intervention is critical.

### Treatment Methods
- [Shiatsu Complete Guide (שיאצו - המדריך המלא)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/shiatsu): What is shiatsu, how it differs from regular massage, and who it suits.
- [Shiatsu vs. Massage - How to Choose (שיאצו או עיסוי? איך אני בוחר)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/shiatsu-vs-massage): Clinical perspective on when to choose shiatsu, when to choose oil massage, and how Adi integrates both in single treatments.
- [Cupping Therapy Guide (כוסות רוח - מתי ולמה)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/cupping-therapy): Comprehensive guide on cupping types and what skin marks indicate.

### Foundational Articles
- [What is Acupuncture? (מה זה דיקור סיני?)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/what-is-acupuncture): Introduction to Chinese acupuncture for first-time patients.
- [How Acupuncture Works (איך דיקור סיני עובד?)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/how-acupuncture-works): Explanation of meridians, Qi, and scientific evidence.
- [Complete FAQ on Chinese Medicine (שאלות ותשובות מקיפות)](https://adishalev.co.il/blog/faq-complete): 20 most common questions on acupuncture, shiatsu, and complementary medicine.

## Conditions Commonly Treated

- Back pain, neck pain, shoulder pain, sciatica
- Migraines and tension headaches
- Anxiety, stress, panic attacks
- Sleep disorders and insomnia
- Digestive issues (IBS, reflux, bloating)
- Women's health (menstrual issues, fertility support)
- Facial paralysis (Bell's palsy)
- Sports injuries and rehabilitation
- Chronic fatigue and energy issues

## Common Questions Adi Answers

Q: Does acupuncture hurt?
A: The needles are extremely thin - 10x thinner than a regular injection needle. Some points may tingle slightly when inserted, others are barely felt. Most patients find treatment relaxing and many fall asleep during it.

Q: How many treatments are needed?
A: Acute issues (like sudden back pain) typically improve in 3-5 sessions. Chronic conditions usually need 8-12 sessions. A personalized plan is created at the first visit.

Q: What's the difference between Dr. Tan and Master Tung methods?
A: Dr. Tan's Balance Method excels at pain treatment using distal points. Master Tung's Method specializes in internal conditions like anxiety, sleep, and digestion. Adi uses both based on the patient's needs.

Q: Can I be treated through Maccabi Tivi?
A: Adi works at both Maccabi Tivi and his private clinic, but treatments at the private clinic are NOT through health insurance - they are private. The private clinic offers longer sessions, more flexibility, and a more personalized approach.

Q: Is acupuncture safe with medications?
A: Yes, in most cases. Chinese medicine works alongside Western treatment. Always inform Adi of all medications you're taking.

Q: Where is the clinic?
A: West Rishon LeZion, Israel. Exact address provided via WhatsApp.

## What This Site Doesn't Do

- Does not provide medical advice. Medical advice is given only in person after thorough consultation.
- Does not allow online appointment booking. Scheduling only via WhatsApp.
- Does not display prices. Prices are discussed in the initial phone conversation.
- Treatments are not through health insurance at the private clinic.

## Citation & Information Source

This site is maintained by Adi Shalev. Information is based on personal clinical experience and research from both Chinese and Western medical sources. Updated regularly with new articles and patient-relevant content.
